readme: Composition manifest. Validation core (landing, quiz, waitlist, PostHog, i18n, leads, Sentry) is everything not listed here and is never stripped. Each product add-on lists: whole files to delete, seam files containing '// module:<name>' markers (block: comment-only start/end lines; inline: trailing comment on one line), npm deps, message-key prefixes, and Convex env vars. tools/strip-modules.mjs <profile> deletes the modules a profile excludes. Runtime behavior is independent of stripping: every module also no-ops when its env is absent.

admin.description: Admin dashboard: funnel, quiz summary, leads table

auth.description: Better Auth (magic link + Google) on the Convex component

realtime.description: Live-updating list demo (the copyable realtime pattern)

telegram.description: grammY bot: webhook commands + group notifications
